This paper presents a comprehensive study on machine learning in NLP and educational research contexts.
Recent transformer-based architectures demonstrate strong performance improvements in semantic understanding, contextual retrieval, and reasoning-heavy tasks.
Self-regulated learning in technology-enhanced environments remains a promising area for integrating AI support with pedagogical frameworks.
Experiments were conducted on a benchmark dataset with cross-validation and ablation analysis to quantify model behavior.

Future work should focus on explainability and practical integration in educational workflows.

current_chinese: 明确阅读目标与研究问题方向，生成可追踪的目的卡片。
desired_chinese: 明确阅读目标与研究问题方向，生成可追踪的目的卡片。

english: Track search logs, keywords, and candidate papers with reusable search strategies.
current_chinese: 管理检索记录、关键词与候选文献，沉淀可复用检索策略。
desired_chinese: 管理检索记录、关键词与候选文献，沉淀可复用检索策略。

english: Build knowledge assets with PDF reading, highlights, literature notes, and permanent notes.
current_chinese: 围绕 PDF 阅读、标注、文献笔记与永久笔记形成知识资产。
desired_chinese: 围绕 PDF 阅读、标注、文献笔记与永久笔记形成知识资产。

english: Expand your pool through citation trails and thematic relations for systematic coverage.
current_chinese: 沿引文网络与主题关系扩展文献池，形成系统化阅读路径。
desired_chinese: 沿引文网络与主题关系扩展文献池，形成系统化阅读路径。

english: Visualize concept maps and evidence structures to spot meaningful research gaps.
current_chinese: 将概念、证据与论证结构可视化，快速识别研究空白。
desired_chinese: 将概念、证据与论证结构可视化，快速识别研究空白。

english: Convert notes and artifacts into structured writing blocks and paper drafts.
current_chinese: 把卡片与笔记回填到写作，完成从阅读到论文草稿的闭环。
desired_chinese: 把卡片与笔记回填到写作，完成从阅读到论文草稿的闭环。

english: Keep purpose cards, search logs, notes, concepts, and drafts in one place so research artifacts stay connected instead of scattered.
current_chinese: 集中管理项目里的目的卡片、检索日志、笔记、概念和草稿，让研究产件不再散落在不同步骤里。
desired_chinese: 集中管理项目里的目的卡片、检索日志、笔记、概念和草稿，让研究产件不再散落在不同步骤里。

english: Bundle high-value artifacts into reusable packages for personal libraries, cross-project reuse, and faster knowledge transfer.
current_chinese: 把一组高价值产件打包成可复用的研究包，用于个人沉淀、跨项目复用和知识迁移。
desired_chinese: 把一组高价值产件打包成可复用的研究包，用于个人沉淀、跨项目复用和知识迁移。

english: Explore community-shared packages, learn from other researchers' structured outputs, and import the ones worth building on.
current_chinese: 浏览社区共享的研究包，吸收他人的结构化产出，并将合适内容纳入自己的研究工作台。
desired_chinese: 浏览社区共享的研究包，吸收他人的结构化产出，并将合适内容纳入自己的研究工作台。

english: Invite project members into the same research space instead of splitting evidence across chat threads and documents.
current_chinese: 邀请项目成员围绕同一研究主题协作，避免资料和判断分散在聊天工具里。
desired_chinese: 邀请项目成员围绕同一研究主题协作，避免资料和判断分散在聊天工具里。

english: Work from the same papers, artifacts, and workflow context so handoffs are lighter and decisions stay visible.
current_chinese: 围绕共享项目查看相同的文献、产件与工作流上下文，减少交接成本。
desired_chinese: 围绕共享项目查看相同的文献、产件与工作流上下文，减少交接成本。

english: Premium unlocks Team access and higher collaboration limits for advisors, research groups, and co-writing workflows.
current_chinese: 高级版解锁团队与更高协作额度，适合导师-学生、小组和联合写作场景。
desired_chinese: 高级版解锁团队与更高协作额度，适合导师-学生、小组和联合写作场景。

current_chinese: 结构化学术阅读与写作
desired_chinese: 结构化学术阅读与写作

english: From Literature Discovery to First Draft,
current_chinese: 从文献检索到论文草稿，
desired_chinese: 从文献检索到论文草稿，

english: Built for academic reading and writing: define purpose, discover papers, read deeply, expand evidence, visualize insights, and draft with structure inside each project.
current_chinese: 这个系统围绕学术阅读和写作设计：目标定义、文献发现、深度阅读、知识扩展、证据可视化、结构化写作，全部在一个项目里沉淀。
desired_chinese: 这个系统围绕学术阅读和写作设计：目标定义、文献发现、深度阅读、知识扩展、证据可视化、结构化写作，全部在一个项目里沉淀。

english: Make research artifacts persistent, packageable, and shareable
current_chinese: 让研究产件可沉淀、可打包、可共享
desired_chinese: 让研究产件可沉淀、可打包、可共享

english: Beyond the workflow itself, Research Workspace includes an artifacts layer that turns working outputs into reusable research assets.
current_chinese: 除了工作流步骤本身，研究工作流还提供一层面向成果沉淀的研究产物体系，帮助你把过程产出变成可复用资产。
desired_chinese: 除了工作流步骤本身，研究工作流还提供一层面向成果沉淀的研究产物体系，帮助你把过程产出变成可复用资产。

english: When research is not a solo activity, Team keeps members, papers, artifacts, and writing context inside one shared project space.
current_chinese: 当研究不再是一个人的任务，团队能把成员、文献、产件与写作上下文维持在同一个项目空间。
desired_chinese: 当研究不再是一个人的任务，团队能把成员、文献、产件与写作上下文维持在同一个项目空间。

english: Free is enough to experience the workflow and artifacts system. Premium is designed for ongoing research that needs multi-project organization, broader package access, and team collaboration.
current_chinese: 免费版适合先体验完整工作流与研究产物体系。高级版面向需要多项目管理、社区资源扩展和团队协作的持续研究场景。
desired_chinese: 免费版适合先体验完整工作流与研究产物体系。高级版面向需要多项目管理、社区资源扩展和团队协作的持续研究场景。
